critical_invariants.reason: Failed/unsupported/duplicate/OCR-required upload outcomes are terminally classified in Rust tests and the 391-file stress suite has zero deviations; failed and unsupported outcomes create zero source objects, and Saksrom answer eligibility is covered by UI readiness tests.
Accepted documents are persisted with stable document id and sha256 in Rust integration tests.
Structured answer validation rejects unknown sources and requires allowed source ids.
Document basis and smoke path tests cover ready, OCR/manual review, unreadable, and import health UI states.
Default settings block document/chat logging, but a full runtime log scan is still required.
Persistence is covered at database level, but clean restart smoke on a separate profile is still manual.
Unsupported/invalid provider answers are blocked and safe fallback behavior is tested.
Provider answer validation now blocks prompt-injection echoes such as 'ignorer alle tidligere instruksjoner', in addition to existing untrusted-source prompting and safe fallback tests.
Core audit events are tested for create/import/AI/delete and backup restore, but export and policy-change audit coverage is not fully closed.
External AI is off by default and raw/full document sending requires explicit settings.
Release is explicitly pilot/pre-alpha labeled and production DoD blocks broad production use.
Export smoke and timestamp/source-basis assertion remain P1 evidence gaps.
Encrypted backup/restore roundtrip preserves cases and audits restore.
